message:
fix(ci): Build Binaryen from source for C library

The Ubuntu binaryen package only provides the wasm-opt binary,
not the libbinaryen C library that edgebox-wasm-opt needs.

Changes:
- Build Binaryen v119 from source using cmake + ninja
- Install to /usr/local to provide both binary and C library
- Fix build target: build-cli -> cli (correct target name)

This provides the full Binaryen development library for linking
edgebox-wasm-opt while maintaining the same functionality.

files.patch:
@@ -61,11 +61,24 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install LLVM for WAMR AOT compiler
         run: sudo apt-get install -y llvm-18-dev
 
+      - name: Build Binaryen from source
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get install -y cmake ninja-build
+          git clone --depth 1 --branch version_119 https://github.com/WebAssembly/binaryen.git /tmp/binaryen
+          cd /tmp/binaryen
+          cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr/local .
+          ninja
+          sudo ninja install
+          sudo ldconfig
+
       - name: Build WAMR
         run: ./scripts/build-wamr.sh
 
-      - name: Build CLI (benchmark subset)
-        run: zig build bench -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+      - name: Build EdgeBox for benchmarks
+        run: |
+          zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+          zig build runner -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
+          zig build cli -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
 
       - name: Run Benchmark - ${{ matrix.benchmark.title }}
         run: |
